summary: Kang Hyunwoo prepares for a challenging battle against a powerful Emperor-class opponent as part of a testing phase. He receives support buffs from Tengi and activates multiple high-level skills to compensate for the opponent's overwhelming stats and aura. Despite the extreme difficulty and debuffs, Hyunwoo successfully lands a decisive hit to conclude the second phase of the test.
key_moments: Tengi provides support buffs to Hyunwoo before the battle begins.
Hyunwoo activates various strength and aura skills to counteract his opponent's superior stats and the 'Slow' status effect.
Hyunwoo successfully executes a surprise attack using summoned greatswords to end the second phase of the test.
